item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll keep this to a local artifact only. Because this is a benchmark run with explicit no-network/no-commit rules, I’ll inspect the repository state and release checklist locally and avoid the AGENTS.md pull step.

item.aggregated_output:
./SECURITY.md:32:publish a security advisory or release note after the issue is resolved.
./CLAUDE.md:6:- model private integrations through registries or manifests;
./CLAUDE.md:9:- treat version bumps as incomplete until the matching remote tag and GitHub Release have both been created and verified.
./AGENTS.md:9:- Use project/user registries and skill manifests for private integrations:
./AGENTS.md:22:## Distribution Release Rule
./AGENTS.md:24:- A version bump is not a completed distribution release until the matching `vX.Y.Z` git tag exists on the remote and the GitHub Release for that tag exists.
./AGENTS.md:25:- Before reporting a distribution release as complete, verify both with `git ls-remote --tags origin vX.Y.Z` and `gh release view vX.Y.Z --repo tackeyy/mission`.
./AGENTS.md:26:- If manifests, README install paths, or changelogs are updated to a new version, the same task must carry through tag push and GitHub Release creation/update, unless the user explicitly asks to stop before publication.
./skills/mission-critic/SKILL.md:82:- 3回連続で停滞(orchestrator の stagnation_count>=3 と整合)した場合は「ユーザー質問推奨」フラグを立てて返す（orchestrator が Trigger 2 を発動）
./SECURITY.ja.md:29:maintainer が報告を triage し、必要に応じて修正を準備します。解決後に security advisory または release note を公開します。
./CHANGELOG.md:3:[Japanese](CHANGELOG.ja.md) | **English**
./CHANGELOG.md:7:The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
./CHANGELOG.md:10:## [Unreleased]
./CHANGELOG.md:21:- Documented the versioning policy that separates ordinary merge releases from intentional distribution releases, so plugin versions are not bumped for every merged PR.
./CHANGELOG.md:30:- Release guardrails now require distribution releases to create and push the matching git tag, create or update the GitHub Release, and re-verify both before completion is reported.
./CHANGELOG.md:69:- Release checklist now requires reconciling `git log <previous-tag>..HEAD --oneline` with English and Japanese changelog entries before release completion.
./CHANGELOG.md:70:- Documentation consistency tests now guard the v1.0.2 release themes so future changelog edits cannot silently drop them.
./CHANGELOG.md:73:- Corrected the v1.0.2 changelog entry to include the Phase 1 specialist selection checkpoint, specialist registry, file-overlap warnings, audit CLI, GitHub Flow guidance, contributor acknowledgements, reviewer/scorer safeguards, audit diagnostics, and Codex hook-packaging validation.
./CHANGELOG.md:96:- **Q11 – stagnation auto-count**: `push-score` now increments `stagnation_count` automatically when the composite improvement (`cur − prev`) is in the range `[0, 0.1)`. Regression (score drop) and first-push are treated as non-stagnation and reset the counter to 0.
./CHANGELOG.md:100:- **Q11 regression fix**: negative delta (score regression) was incorrectly treated as stagnation. Condition tightened to `0 <= delta < 0.1` using `_is_valid_composite()` for type safety.
./CHANGELOG.md:106:First public release.

./CHANGELOG.ja.md:96:- **Q11 – stagnation 自動カウント**: `push-score` で composite の改善幅 (`cur − prev`) が `[0, 0.1)` の場合に `stagnation_count` を自動インクリメント。後退（スコア低下）と初回 push は停滞と見なさず 0 にリセット。
./CHANGELOG.ja.md:100:- **Q11 後退ロジック修正**: 負の delta（スコア後退）が誤って stagnation として計上されていたバグを修正。条件を `0 <= delta < 0.1` に限定し、`_is_valid_composite()` による型チェックも追加。

./skills/mission/SKILL.md:231:**Simple 級は executor インライン可 (P3-5)**: 複雑度 Simple (単一ファイル・1ステップ) では mission-executor を spawn せず orchestrator が直接実行してよい (実測根拠: refs/changelog.md P3-5)。Standard 以上はコンテキスト圧迫防止のため spawn 必須。なお複雑度に関わらず、サブエージェントに書込権限がないパス (dotfiles 等) への変更はインラインで行う。
./skills/mission/SKILL.md:233:**iter 2 以降は差分レビュー (P2)**: フルレビュー (Reviewer N 名) は **iter 1 のみ**。**この差分縮小は Reviewer のみが対象**。`mission-planner` / `mission-executor` は周回ごとに走り続ける (Phase 6 の非合格枝は Critic → **Phase 2 (planner) へ戻る**。planner は Critic の「Planner 申し送り」を反映した軽量再計画として iter2+ でも呼び、省略しない)。iter 2 以降の「前 iter 指摘の修正」周回では Reviewer を **検証担当 1 名** に絞り、args に (a) 前 iter の High/Medium 指摘リスト + 修正コミット一覧 (b) 「指摘が解消されたか・修正による新規デグレがないかのみ検証。全 diff の再レビューは不要。**採点は絶対評価を維持 (Low 残存で 5.0 禁止)。解消の確認は加点理由にしない**」を明記する。例外: iter 2 以降で**新機能を追加**した場合はその部分だけフルレビューに戻す (実測根拠: refs/changelog.md P2)。

./docs/VERSIONING.md:5:This repository separates normal PR integration from distribution releases.
./docs/VERSIONING.md:9:- **Merge release**: merge a PR to `main`, wait for CI, close linked issues, and
./docs/VERSIONING.md:11:- **Distribution release**: intentionally publish a new plugin version with a
./docs/VERSIONING.md:12:  `vX.Y.Z` tag, GitHub Release, manifest version bumps, install-path updates, and
./docs/VERSIONING.md:13:  release changelog entries.
./docs/VERSIONING.md:15:When a user asks to "release" without explicitly asking for a version bump,
./docs/VERSIONING.md:16:GitHub Release, marketplace release, or tag, treat it as a merge release.
./docs/VERSIONING.md:22:Keep user-facing changes in `CHANGELOG.md` and `CHANGELOG.ja.md` under
./docs/VERSIONING.md:23:`[Unreleased]`. Create a distribution release only when intentionally publishing
./docs/VERSIONING.md:30:Create an immediate patch distribution release only when a published version has
./docs/VERSIONING.md:40:non-blocking UX improvements should accumulate in `[Unreleased]`.
./docs/VERSIONING.md:48:- **PATCH**: compatible bug fixes, documentation corrections, release metadata
./docs/VERSIONING.md:53:A distribution release PR should be mostly mechanical:
./docs/VERSIONING.md:55:- move relevant `[Unreleased]` entries into `vX.Y.Z` in both changelogs
./docs/VERSIONING.md:59:- reconcile `git log <previous-tag>..HEAD --oneline` with both changelogs
./docs/VERSIONING.md:60:- run the marketplace release checklist
./docs/VERSIONING.md:62:Do not mix new feature work into the release PR.

./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:5:この repository では、通常の PR merge と配布 release を分離します。
./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:9:- **merge release**: PR を `main` に merge し、CI を待ち、関連 issue を閉じ、branch を cleanup すること。plugin version は変更しません。
./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:10:- **distribution release**: 新しい plugin version を意図的に公開すること。`vX.Y.Z` tag、GitHub Release、manifest version bump、install path 更新、release changelog entry を含みます。
./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:12:ユーザーが単に「リリース」と言い、version bump、GitHub Release、marketplace release、tag を明示していない場合は、merge release として扱います。
./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:18:user-facing な変更は `CHANGELOG.md` と `CHANGELOG.ja.md` の `[Unreleased]` に積みます。distribution release は、plugin user に変更のまとまりを配布すると意図的に判断した時だけ作成します。
./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:24:公開済み version に次の問題がある場合だけ、即時 patch distribution release を作成します。
./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:31:小さな docs 修正、tests、internal refactor、audit output の polish、non-blocking UX improvement は `[Unreleased]` に蓄積します。
./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:37:- **PATCH**: 互換性のある bug fix、documentation correction、release metadata correction、wrapper/package sync fix。
./docs/VERSIONING.ja.md:41:distribution release PR は、基本的に機械的な変更だけにします。

./plugins/mission/skills/mission/refs/changelog.md:11:結論: 合格時は基本即打ち止め。stagnation 判定を 5 連続 → 3 連続に短縮。`--max-iter` デフォルト 3 の根拠も同データ (3 超の追加 iter は ROI 低下)。
./plugins/mission/skills/mission/SKILL.md:80:| `--max-iter N` | 最大反復回数（達成時は即終了）。`0` = 上限なし（停滞 3 回で停止） | `3`（実測根拠は refs/changelog.md P1 参照） |
./plugins/mission/skills/mission/SKILL.md:185:4. **task_profile + specialist/provider 自動選定**: `documentation/frontend/backend/security/testing/infra/product/research/general` 等を分類し、`refs/specialist-registry.md` の project/user registry + skill/plugin manifests + beginner presets から任意 evidence provider を選ぶ。provider は `kind: skill` または `kind: command`。選定は散文で済ませず、init 後の必須 checkpoint として `mission-state.py specialists recommend --record-state` で state に記録する。未導入なら core subskills のみで継続
./plugins/mission/skills/mission/SKILL.md:231:**Simple 級は executor インライン可 (P3-5)**: 複雑度 Simple (単一ファイル・1ステップ) では mission-executor を spawn せず orchestrator が直接実行してよい (実測根拠: refs/changelog.md P3-5)。Standard 以上はコンテキスト圧迫防止のため spawn 必須。なお複雑度に関わらず、サブエージェントに書込権限がないパス (dotfiles 等) への変更はインラインで行う。
./plugins/mission/skills/mission/SKILL.md:233:**iter 2 以降は差分レビュー (P2)**: フルレビュー (Reviewer N 名) は **iter 1 のみ**。**この差分縮小は Reviewer のみが対象**。`mission-planner` / `mission-executor` は周回ごとに走り続ける (Phase 6 の非合格枝は Critic → **Phase 2 (planner) へ戻る**。planner は Critic の「Planner 申し送り」を反映した軽量再計画として iter2+ でも呼び、省略しない)。iter 2 以降の「前 iter 指摘の修正」周回では Reviewer を **検証担当 1 名** に絞り、args に (a) 前 iter の High/Medium 指摘リスト + 修正コミット一覧 (b) 「指摘が解消されたか・修正による新規デグレがないかのみ検証。全 diff の再レビューは不要。**採点は絶対評価を維持 (Low 残存で 5.0 禁止)。解消の確認は加点理由にしない**」を明記する。例外: iter 2 以降で**新機能を追加**した場合はその部分だけフルレビューに戻す (実測根拠: refs/changelog.md P2)。
./plugins/mission/skills/mission/SKILL.md:249:    # P1: Early-Stop Sweet Spot — 合格時は基本即打ち止め (実測根拠: refs/changelog.md P1)

item.text: I found the release checklist and the repository-level release rules locally. I’m reading the relevant docs now, then I’ll write only the benchmark artifact with each proposed fix tied to a rule or checklist gap.

item.aggregated_output:
1	# Agent Guardrails
     2	
     3	This repository is OSS. Keep public behavior portable across users, machines, and agent runtimes.
     4	
     5	## Personal Skill Boundary
     6	
     7	- Do not add maintainer-local or organization-specific skills to OSS defaults.
     8	- Do not hard-code personal skill names, private workflow taxonomies, home-directory paths, or local command providers into core behavior.
     9	- Use project/user registries and skill manifests for private integrations:
    10	  - `.mission/specialists.yml` for project-local policy
    11	  - `~/.config/mission/specialists.yml` for user-local defaults
    12	  - installed `mission-specialist.yml` files for skill-provided metadata
    13	- Tests for extension behavior must use neutral fixture names, not a maintainer's private skill set.
    14	- Documentation may mention private skills only as clearly labeled examples, never as required or bundled OSS capabilities.
    15	
    16	## Specialist Policy
    17	
    18	- OSS code may define generic provider protocols, registry schemas, ranking logic, audit output, and safety gates.
    19	- External specialists are evidence providers only. `mission` owns state, scoring, pass/fail gates, and final reporting.
    20	- Broad orchestrator skills must be bounded to a single evidence artifact such as a plan, review, or synthesis note. Do not nest a second autonomous completion loop inside `/mission`.
    21	
    22	## Distribution Release Rule
    23	
    24	- A version bump is not a completed distribution release until the matching `vX.Y.Z` git tag exists on the remote and the GitHub Release for that tag exists.
    25	- Before reporting a distribution release as complete, verify both with `git ls-remote --tags origin vX.Y.Z` and `gh release view vX.Y.Z --repo tackeyy/mission`.
    26	- If manifests, README install paths, or changelogs are updated to a new version, the same task must carry through tag push and GitHub Release creation/update, unless the user explicitly asks to stop before publication.

1	# Marketplace Release Checklist
     2	
     3	Claude Code / Codex marketplace に `mission` を出す前に使うチェックリスト。
     4	
     5	開始前に、これは通常の merge release ではなく **distribution release** であることを確認します。詳細は [`VERSIONING.ja.md`](VERSIONING.ja.md) を参照してください。PR を merge するたびに version を上げません。
     6	
     7	## 共通
     8	
     9	- [ ] この release は新しい plugin version を意図的に配布するものである。通常の PR merge では version を変えず、entry は `[Unreleased]` に残す。
    10	- [ ] repository visibility の変更は意図的なもの。通常検証の一部として public 化しない。
    11	- [ ] `git status --short` に意図した release 変更だけが残っている。
    12	- [ ] secret、token、private URL、local-only state、`.mission-state/`、`.pytest_cache/`、個人マシン固有の絶対パスが含まれていない。
    13	- [ ] `LICENSE`、`README.md`、`SECURITY.md`、`CONTRIBUTING.md`、Code of Conduct が揃っている。
    14	- [ ] user-facing な install / release 手順を変えた場合、英日 docs を同時に更新している。
    15	- [ ] `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`、`.codex-plugin/plugin.json`、`plugins/mission/.codex-plugin/plugin.json`、README の install path、Codex setup docs の version number を同時に bump している。
    16	- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` と `CHANGELOG.ja.md` に新 version の release entry と link を追加している。
    17	- [ ] `git log <previous-tag>..HEAD --oneline` と新しい changelog entry を突合し、user-facing な `feat:` / `fix:` / audit / release-process 変更が英日両方に反映されている。
    18	- [ ] release 対象 commit に新しい `vX.Y.Z` git tag を作成し、remote に push している。
    19	- [ ] release 完了報告前に、新しい `vX.Y.Z` tag の GitHub Release を作成または更新している。
    20	- [ ] `git ls-remote --tags origin vX.Y.Z` と `gh release view vX.Y.Z --repo tackeyy/mission` で公開状態を再照合している。両方で新 version を確認できるまで distribution release 完了とは報告しない。
    21	- [ ] `skills/mission` で `python3 -m pytest -q` が pass する。
    22	- [ ] `shellcheck scripts/mission-stop-guard.sh` が pass する。
    23	- [ ] JSON / YAML metadata が parse できる。
    24	
    25	## Claude Code
    26	
    27	- [ ] `claude plugin validate /path/to/mission` が warning なしで pass する。
    28	- [ ] isolated install が成功する。
    29	  - `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR="$(mktemp -d)"`
    30	  - `claude plugin marketplace add /path/to/mission`
    31	  - `claude plugin install mission@mission-marketplace`
    32	- [ ] `claude plugin details mission` に 6 skills と 1 `Stop` hook が表示される。
    33	- [ ] active mission state がある実 Claude Code session で、`Stop` hook の `decision:block` response が出る。
    34	
    35	## Codex
    36	
    37	- [ ] `skills/` または `scripts/` を変えた後、`scripts/sync-codex-plugin-wrapper.sh` を実行している。
    38	- [ ] isolated `CODEX_HOME` で `codex plugin marketplace add /path/to/mission` が成功する。
    39	- [ ] `codex plugin list` に `mission@mission-marketplace` が表示される。
    40	- [ ] `codex plugin add mission@mission-marketplace` が成功する。
    41	- [ ] install cache に `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`、`skills/mission/SKILL.md`、`skills/mission/bin/mission-state.py`、`scripts/mission-stop-guard.sh` が入っている。
    42	- [ ] install cache に `.git`、`.mission-state`、`.pytest_cache` が入っていない。
    43	- [ ] `MISSION_PLUGIN_ROOT` と互換 alias `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` を install cache path 用に案内している。
    44	- [ ] Codex Stop hook は、Codex の plugin-root path handling が検証できるまでは opt-in user hook として記載している。
    45	
    46	## Final Gate
    47	
    48	- [ ] GitHub repository visibility が意図した値のままであることを確認する。
    49	- [ ] applicable checks がすべて pass してから commit / push する。

1	# Versioning Policy
     2	
     3	[Japanese](VERSIONING.ja.md) | **English**
     4	
     5	This repository separates normal PR integration from distribution releases.
     6	
     7	## Definitions
     8	
     9	- **Merge release**: merge a PR to `main`, wait for CI, close linked issues, and
    10	  clean up branches. This does not change plugin versions.
    11	- **Distribution release**: intentionally publish a new plugin version with a
    12	  `vX.Y.Z` tag, GitHub Release, manifest version bumps, install-path updates, and
    13	  release changelog entries.
    14	
    15	When a user asks to "release" without explicitly asking for a version bump,
    16	GitHub Release, marketplace release, or tag, treat it as a merge release.
    17	
    18	## Default Rule
    19	
    20	Do not bump versions for every merged PR.
    21	
    22	Keep user-facing changes in `CHANGELOG.md` and `CHANGELOG.ja.md` under
    23	`[Unreleased]`. Create a distribution release only when intentionally publishing
    24	a batch of changes to plugin users.
    25	
    26	The default cadence is at most weekly, unless a hotfix is required.
    27	
    28	## Hotfix Exceptions
    29	
    30	Create an immediate patch distribution release only when a published version has
    31	one of these problems:
    32	
    33	- install, startup, or basic `mission-state.py` commands are broken
    34	- state corruption or pass/fail gate bypass
    35	- security or privacy risk
    36	- marketplace metadata or wrapper sync drift causes installed users to receive a
    37	  broken package
    38	
    39	Small documentation edits, tests, internal refactors, audit output polish, and
    40	non-blocking UX improvements should accumulate in `[Unreleased]`.
    41	
    42	## SemVer Mapping
    43	
    44	- **MAJOR**: breaking changes to state schema, CLI contracts, or existing mission
    45	  workflow compatibility.
    46	- **MINOR**: new compatible capabilities such as provider protocols, new CLI
    47	  commands, or new audit/reporting surfaces.
    48	- **PATCH**: compatible bug fixes, documentation corrections, release metadata
    49	  corrections, and wrapper/package sync fixes.
    50	
    51	## Release PR Scope
    52	
    53	A distribution release PR should be mostly mechanical:
    54	
    55	- move relevant `[Unreleased]` entries into `vX.Y.Z` in both changelogs
    56	- update `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`, and
    57	  `plugins/mission/.codex-plugin/plugin.json`
    58	- update visible install paths in README and Codex setup docs
    59	- reconcile `git log <previous-tag>..HEAD --oneline` with both changelogs
    60	- run the marketplace release checklist
    61	
    62	Do not mix new feature work into the release PR.

1	# Marketplace Release Checklist
     2	
     3	Use this checklist before submitting `mission` to Claude Code or Codex marketplaces.
     4	
     5	Before starting, confirm this is a **distribution release**, not an ordinary
     6	merge release. See [`VERSIONING.md`](VERSIONING.md). Do not bump versions for
     7	every merged PR.
     8	
     9	## Shared
    10	
    11	- [ ] This release intentionally publishes a new plugin version; ordinary PR merges should leave versions unchanged and keep entries under `[Unreleased]`.
    12	- [ ] Repository visibility change is intentional. Do not make the repository public as part of routine validation.
    13	- [ ] `git status --short` contains only intended release changes.
    14	- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private URLs, local-only state, `.mission-state/`, `.pytest_cache/`, or personal machine paths are included.
    15	- [ ] `LICENSE`, `README.md`, `SECURITY.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, and Code of Conduct are present.
    16	- [ ] English and Japanese docs are updated together when user-facing install or release steps change.
    17	- [ ] Version numbers are bumped together in `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`, `plugins/mission/.codex-plugin/plugin.json`, README install paths, and Codex setup docs.
    18	- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` and `CHANGELOG.ja.md` contain the release entry and links for the new version.
    19	- [ ] Compare `git log <previous-tag>..HEAD --oneline` with the new changelog entry, and confirm every user-facing `feat:` / `fix:` / audit or release-process change is represented in both English and Japanese.
    20	- [ ] Create and push the new `vX.Y.Z` git tag for the exact release commit.
    21	- [ ] Create or update the GitHub Release for the new `vX.Y.Z` tag before reporting release completion.
    22	- [ ] Re-verify publication with `git ls-remote --tags origin vX.Y.Z` and `gh release view vX.Y.Z --repo tackeyy/mission`; do not report a distribution release as complete until both commands confirm the new version.
    23	- [ ] `python3 -m pytest -q` passes under `skills/mission`.
    24	- [ ] `shellcheck scripts/mission-stop-guard.sh` passes.
    25	- [ ] JSON/YAML metadata parses successfully.
    26	
    27	## Claude Code
    28	
    29	- [ ] `claude plugin validate /path/to/mission` passes without warnings.
    30	- [ ] Isolated install succeeds:
    31	  - `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR="$(mktemp -d)"`
    32	  - `claude plugin marketplace add /path/to/mission`
    33	  - `claude plugin install mission@mission-marketplace`
    34	- [ ] `claude plugin details mission` shows six skills and one `Stop` hook.
    35	- [ ] A real Claude Code session with an active mission state emits a `Stop` hook `decision:block` response.
    36	
    37	## Codex
    38	
    39	- [ ] Run `scripts/sync-codex-plugin-wrapper.sh` after any `skills/` or `scripts/` change.
    40	- [ ] `codex plugin marketplace add /path/to/mission` succeeds under an isolated `CODEX_HOME`.
    41	- [ ] `codex plugin list` shows `mission@mission-marketplace`.
    42	- [ ] `codex plugin add mission@mission-marketplace` succeeds.
    43	- [ ] Installed cache contains `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`, `skills/mission/SKILL.md`, `skills/mission/bin/mission-state.py`, and `scripts/mission-stop-guard.sh`.
    44	- [ ] Installed cache does not contain `.git`, `.mission-state`, or `.pytest_cache`.
    45	- [ ] `MISSION_PLUGIN_ROOT` and compatibility alias `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` are documented for the installed cache path.
    46	- [ ] Codex Stop hook remains documented as opt-in user hook unless Codex plugin-root path handling is verified.
    47	
    48	## Final Gate
    49	
    50	- [ ] Confirm GitHub repository visibility is still the intended value.
    51	- [ ] Commit and push only after all applicable checks pass.

   183	def test_release_version_paths_are_in_sync():
   184	    """Plugin manifests and visible install paths should point at the same release version."""
   185	    manifest_paths = (
   186	        ".claude-plugin/plugin.json",
   187	        ".codex-plugin/plugin.json",
   188	        "plugins/mission/.codex-plugin/plugin.json",
   189	    )
   190	    versions = {
   191	        json.loads((REPO_ROOT / path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))["version"]
   192	        for path in manifest_paths
   193	    }
   194	    assert len(versions) == 1, f"manifest versions differ: {versions}"
   195	    version = versions.pop()
   196	    expected_path = f"mission-marketplace/mission/{version}"
   197	    for rel in (
   198	        "README.md",
   199	        "README.ja.md",
   200	        "skills/mission/refs/codex-setup.md",
   201	        "plugins/mission/skills/mission/refs/codex-setup.md",
   202	    ):
   203	        assert expected_path in _r(REPO_ROOT / rel), f"{rel} does not reference {expected_path}"
   204	
   205	
   206	def test_release_checklist_requires_git_log_changelog_reconciliation():
   207	    """release 時に commit subjects と changelog の突合を必須化する."""
   208	    required = "git log <previous-tag>..HEAD --oneline"
   209	    for rel in ("docs/MARKETPLACE_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md", "docs/MARKETPLACE_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.ja.md"):
   210	        txt = _r(REPO_ROOT / rel)
   211	        assert required in txt and "CHANGELOG" in txt.upper(), \
   212	            f"{rel} must require git log vs changelog reconciliation"
   213	
   214	
   215	def test_distribution_release_requires_remote_tag_and_github_release_verification():
   216	    """version bump 後の release 完了報告前に tag/GitHub Release の実在確認を必須化する."""
   217	    required_tokens = (
   218	        "git ls-remote --tags origin vX.Y.Z",
   219	        "gh release view vX.Y.Z --repo tackeyy/mission",
   220	        "distribution release",
   221	    )
   222	    for rel in ("docs/MARKETPLACE_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md", "docs/MARKETPLACE_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.ja.md"):
   223	        txt = _r(REPO_ROOT / rel)
   224	        for token in required_tokens:
   225	            assert token in txt, f"{rel} must require release publication verification: {token}"
   226	    agents = _r(REPO_ROOT / "AGENTS.md")
   227	    assert "Distribution Release Rule" in agents
   228	    assert "gh release view vX.Y.Z --repo tackeyy/mission" in agents
   229	    assert "git ls-remote --tags origin vX.Y.Z" in agents
   230	
   231	
   232	def test_versioning_policy_separates_merge_and_distribution_releases():
   233	    """通常 PR merge と配布 version bump を混同しないための方針を docs で固定する."""
   234	    en = _r(REPO_ROOT / "docs/VERSIONING.md").lower()
   235	    ja = _r(REPO_ROOT / "docs/VERSIONING.ja.md").lower()
   236	    assert "merge release" in en and "distribution release" in en
   237	    assert "do not bump versions for every merged pr" in en
   238	    assert "hotfix" in en and "at most weekly" in en
   239	    assert "merge release" in ja and "distribution release" in ja
